summary.blockingCount: {{count}} environment issues must be fixed first.
summary.warningCount: {{count}} environment hints — you can still proceed.

internal.title: Preflight check failed
internal.message: Could not complete the preflight check. Please try again.

render.title: Preflight UI init failed
render.message: The preflight UI failed to initialize.

stuck.title: Preflight did not complete
stuck.message: Preflight did not finish in the expected time. Click Re-check or restart the app.

whisperflowPackage.okMessage: Bundled whisperflow Python package is installed.
whisperflowPackage.errorMessage: The bundled whisperflow Python package was not found — app resources may be damaged.

ffmpeg.missingMessage: WhisperFlow Studio needs ffmpeg to decode audio. Click the button below to detect and install automatically.

vcRedist.okMessage: Microsoft Visual C++ 2015-2022 Redistributable (x64) is installed.
vcRedist.missingMessage: WhisperFlow's audio decoding stack (PyAV) requires Microsoft Visual C++ 2015-2022 Redistributable (x64). Missing DLLs: {{dlls}}. Click the button below to download the official installer, then restart WhisperFlow Studio.

bundledPython.okMessage: Using the app's bundled virtual environment for transcription.
bundledPython.notFoundMessage: No system Python 3 is available to bootstrap the venv. Please install Python 3.10+, or specify a python path in Settings.
bundledPython.venvMissingMessage: A virtualenv will be created on first transcription (a few hundred MB).

pythonPath.okMessageAuto: Will use auto-detected system Python to bootstrap the venv.
pythonPath.okMessageExplicit: Will use your specified Python path to bootstrap the venv.
pythonPath.notExistMessage: The specified Python executable does not exist. Please pick a different one or clear this field to use auto-detection.
pythonPath.notFoundMessage: Python 3.10+ was not found. Please install it and try again, or specify a python path here.

mediaRootPath.unsetMessage: Please choose a media folder to scan first.
mediaRootPath.missingMessage: The currently configured media folder does not exist. Please choose another.

scanScript.missingMessage: Scan script not found — please verify that app resources are intact.

cliScript.missingMessage: CLI script not found — please verify that app resources are intact.
